creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #2)
webcolors could perhaps have been updated with the py-jsonschema update (Jul 27), but webcolors is listed as an optional dependency in py-jsonschema's pyproject.toml, so it would not be too surprising if that dependency change wasn't noticed.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/py-jsonschema?id=ab94ca54b9027781377dac545b75bad2a3ee1018

In any case, Robert, try updating your ports tree and close this bug if that resolves your failure.
